query: SELECT id, hostName, cuisineStyle, menuDescription FROM host_listings WHERE status = 'approved';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT id, hostName, cuisineStyle, menuDescription FROM host_listings WHERE status = 'approved';

rows.menuDescription: My specialty is creating a warm, authentic "Shanghai home" dining experience, blending nutritious local flavors with comforting international dishes.

messages: I prepare fresh meals using market ingredients, featuring classics like:
1. Braised Beef Brisket with Daikon Radish (萝卜炖牛腩)
2. Spinach in Supreme Broth with Century Egg (上汤菠菜)
3. Signature Seafood Noodle Soup (海鲜汤面)
4. Foil-Baked Whole Fish with Lemongrass (香茅烤鱼)
5. Creamy Coconut Chicken Curry (椰香咖喱鸡)
The menu can be updated on the day depending on what’s fresh. Or let me know what you want to try :)
